tldr: Chip Huyen's two evergreen guides on GenAI pitfalls and agent architecture join the feed, alongside Import AI 463 covering self-improving robots learning autonomously and a 10,000-GPU cluster coming online in China — a quiet morning push filling in gaps from the feed backlog.

articles.title: Common pitfalls when building generative AI applications
articles.summary: Chip Huyen's comprehensive guide to common mistakes in GenAI app development, from evaluation design to prompt engineering and beyond.

articles.title: Agents
articles.summary: Deep dive on intelligent agents as the ultimate goal of AI — covering architecture patterns, tool use, and real-world implementations.

articles.title: Import AI 463: Self-improving robots; a 10k Chinese GPU cluster; and an elegiac essay for the human era
articles.summary: Robots learning without human supervision, a 10,000-GPU cluster deployed in China, and reflections on the closing of the human era.
